name: Barbell Back Squat (Low Bar)
setup: Bar across rear delts (not on neck)
Grip slightly wider than shoulder-width, wrists neutral
Unrack, step back, feet shoulder-width apart
Core braced, chest up, elbows down
execution: Initiate by sitting back and down (hips + knees simultaneously)
Descend until hip crease below knee (parallel or below)
Drive through mid-foot to stand up
Keep bar path over mid-foot throughout
common_mistakes: Good morning the weight (hips rise faster than chest)
cues: Spread the floor apart with your feet
Brace as if about to be punched
Break at hips and knees at the same time
Drive your back into the bar on the way up
